Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Betway betting on 4x100m relay medal for Team South Africa

South Africa could well add to its medal tally at the Paris Olympics 2024 in the men’s 4x100m relay final Friday, 9 August.

South Africacould well add to its medal tally at theParis Olympics 2024in themen’s 4x100m relayfinalFriday, 9 August.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

The men’s 4x100m relay quartet qualified as thesecond-fastestteam for Friday’s final at the Stade de France.

Drawn in the first of two semi-final heats, the South African quartet were close to last when anchor runnerAkani Simbinetook the baton.

South Africa’s star 100m runner blasted down the finishing straight to cross the line in second place behind the USA.

When all was said and done, South Africa wound up with the second-fastest overall time of37.94, giving them a real shot a medal in the final.

The South African team comprised Bayanda Walaza , Shaun Maswangani, Bradley Nkoana and Akani Simbine.

The USA posted the quickest time of37.47.

Joining the USA and South Africa in the final will be Great Britain, China, France, Canada, Japan and Italy.

Jamaica sensationally missed out on a place in the final.

The final will be held onFriday, 9 Augustat19:47(SA time).

Leading South African bookmakersBetwayhave installed South Africa as the second-favourites for the race at59/5.

TheUSAare overwhelming favourites to claim gold at1/10, despitenothaving 100m gold medal winnerNoah Lylesavailable.

Great Britain (69/5)and Italy(76/5)follow next.

Meanwhile, heading into Friday’s action at the Paris Olympics 2024, Team South Africa finds itself in41stplace in the medal table.

South Africa have won a gold, a silver and two bronze medals to date.

The gold and silver medals were won byTatjana Smithin the women’s 100m breaststroke and 200m breaststroke, respectively.

The men’srugby sevensteam as well asAlan Hatherlyin the men’s mountain bike cross country won the bronze medals.
